elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65 (height chain 0.60 + 3.15 + 2.90 = 6.65)

Sloped roof line visible above the +6.65 roof-beam level, rising left to right with a small angle-indicator diagram at the top, consistent with the 'SLOPE 6°' callout on the roof plan (หน้า08) — same slope profile as รูปด้าน 2 (หน้า10), viewed from the opposite side

'ราวกันตก ดูแบบขยาย A-23' callout at the upper-left, beside an X-hatched panel/stairwell zone with a 'V'-shaped mark — same 2nd-floor balcony guardrail seen on รูปด้าน 1/2 (หน้า09/10), viewed from this side
diagonally cross-hatched ('X') panel with a 'V' mark, upper floor, far left, beside the guardrail callout — not confidently classified
three window openings each tagged hexagon '1', upper floor, evenly spaced across the facade
small window opening tagged hexagon '5', upper floor, far right near the roof edge
diagonally cross-hatched ('X') panel, lower/ground floor, far left, plain 'X' label
three window openings each tagged hexagon '1', lower/ground floor, evenly spaced across the facade
'เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC' reveal lines, one at upper floor level, one at lower floor level
Several small triangle symbols each containing '1', same recurring un-classified marker seen on รูปด้าน 1/2/3 (หน้า09-11)

warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): the bottom dimension chain reads (under grid letters A, B, C, D, E running left to right) '1.50 | 3.50 | 2.30 | 2.70 | 1.10 0.90' with sub-brackets '10.00 | 2.00' — 1.50(A-B)+3.50(B-C)+2.30(C-D)+2.70(D-E)=10.00 matches the master grid's y_lines exactly (read in reverse letter order, A to E left-to-right instead of E to A), and the 1.10+0.90=2.00 zone past gridE matches the north overhang seen on the ground floor plan (หน้า06).

This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '4' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-10) and is the opposite side elevation from รูปด้าน 2 (A-08) — both run along the building's depth axis (grid E-A), viewed from opposite directions, and both show the same sloped roof profile and the ราวกันตก guardrail reference.
Individual door/window opening-number-to-D/W-schedule cross-match not confidently resolvable at this resolution — see the door/window schedule sheet once read later in this extraction pass.
